economic_notes: Band owns OKIB Group of Companies (OKIB Forestry LP, OKIB Operations LP, OKIB Assets LP, OKIB Management Services LP), Okanagan Indian Band Land Holding Company Ltd., and Okanagan Band Development Corporation. One fully consolidated subsidiary: 631640 B.C. Ltd.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to inability to verify carrying value of tangible capital assets acquired prior to 2010 which were expensed at time of acquisition. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $10.5M to $24.9M. Cash increased substantially from $8.97M to $24M. ISC funding figure used is amount due from ISC per Note 5 ($570,092); total federal government transfers per income statement are $24,684,954. Total government transfers calculated as federal ($24,684,954) plus provincial ($1,938,949) = $26,623,903. Council expenses $939,915 noted separately. Three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method.
